title: sideritis nervosa
intro: Sideritis nervosa, also known as Mountain Tea or Ironwort, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its grayish-green leaves and small white flowers. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, primarily due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Sideritis nervosa include reducing stress and anxiety, improving respiratory issues, and boosting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Mountain Tea include dried leaves, tea infusions, and supplements, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal properties and health benefits.
